statusCard.fallbackCaption: Quick view of the general status exposed by /health.

quickRead.visibilityText: A quick glance at the panel operational status without leaving the dashboard.
quickRead.actionsText: Notifications and history review are available in the audits section.

guide.title: Recommended flow
guide.subtitle: Operational summary of the usual path to configure a client, landing and submission intake.
guide.sequenceText: Follow these steps to leave a new implementation ready to operate.
guide.summaryText: Client and landing are the base. The Telegram link activates the connection and the final tests are validated from the landings or submissions area.

steps.step2: Create landing (a default Form is created automatically)
steps.step3: Create or reuse an existing secondary form as primary (optional)
steps.step4: Share the Telegram Connect URL with the client and ask them to press Start
